title: BridgeFsck
description: Bridge-mapping audit findings, emitted by `rebar bridge-fsck --output json` (the {orphaned, duplicates, stale, binding_drift} dict that audit_bridge_mappings builds internally). Each entry is a finding object whose fields vary by anomaly type, so items are permissive objects. `binding_drift` (epic 3006-e198, child 8de5) is the offline arm of the one convergence classifier — it reads bindings.json read-only and reports the binding-level drift the live pass would act on.

binding_drift.description: Binding-level drift from the classifier's offline-decidable cells. `dangling`/`unbound_jira` require a live Jira snapshot and are populated by the online arm; the others are decidable offline.

local_gone.description: Bound but the local ticket is absent from the store (ALERT).

retired_overlap.description: A jira_key present in BOTH the live and retired binding stores.

dangling.description: Confirmed binding whose Jira issue is gone (online arm only).

unbound_jira.description: Jira-native issue with no binding (online arm only).
